title: Dekton 20oz Fibreglass Claw Hammer-Anti-Slip Handle| Shock-Absorbing Fibreglass Core| Durable Steel Head| Precision Balanced| Heavy-Duty Nail Removal| Ideal for Construction, Carpentry| High Resistant
features: High-Performance Construction: The Dekton 2oz Fibreglass Claw Hammer is expertly crafted for professional-grade durability and precision. Featuring a shock-absorbing fibreglass core, this hammer is designed to withstand the rigors of heavy-duty use in various construction and carpentry tasks.

Anti-Slip Handle: Engineered with an anti-slip handle, this hammer provides a secure and comfortable grip. The ergonomic handle design reduces hand fatigue and enhances control, allowing for safer and more efficient hammering. Whether you’re working on delicate tasks or heavy-duty projects, the anti-slip feature ensures a firm hold in any condition.

Durable Steel Head: The hammer’s steel head is precision-forged to deliver exceptional strength and impact resistance. Its durable construction allows for effective driving and removing of nails, making it an essential tool for various applications. The steel head ensures reliable performance and durability, even with frequent use.

Precision Balanced Design: The Dekton Claw Hammer is precision balanced to ensure optimal performance and accuracy. The well-balanced weight distribution allows for more controlled swings and reduced user fatigue. This balanced design enhances the hammer’s effectiveness, making it ideal for precise work and repetitive tasks.

Heavy-Duty Nail Removal: Equipped with a heavy-duty claw, this hammer excels in nail removal tasks. The claw is designed to effortlessly pull out nails, making it a versatile tool for both construction and renovation projects. Its strong and functional claw provides the leverage needed for efficient nail extraction.
description: The Dekton 2oz Fibreglass Claw Hammer is an essential tool for any toolbox, delivering exceptional performance and reliability for both professional and DIY projects. Crafted with a shock-absorbing fibreglass core, this hammer minimizes vibrations, reducing strain on your hands and arms, making it ideal for extended use in construction, carpentry, and home improvement tasks. The anti-slip handle provides a secure grip, ensuring precise control even in challenging conditions, whether you're working indoors or outdoors. This hammer's ergonomic design ensures comfort, allowing you to work efficiently without discomfort. Built with a durable steel head, the Dekton Claw Hammer is engineered to withstand rigorous use, making it perfect for heavy-duty tasks. The precision-balanced design offers superior control and accuracy, ensuring each strike is powerful and effective. The heavy-duty nail removal claw is specifically designed to provide maximum leverage, making it easier to extract even the most stubborn nails with minimal effort. Ideal for a wide range of applications, from framing and roofing to general repairs and woodworking, the Dekton Claw Hammer is versatile enough to meet all your needs. Its high-resistance materials ensure longevity, so you can rely on it for years of use. Whether you're a professional tradesperson or a DIY enthusiast, this hammer combines strength, durability, and comfort to help you get the job done right. The Dekton Claw Hammer is not just a tool; it's a dependable companion for any task that requires precision, power, and reliability.
